themes.title: Far-right parties push 'national priority' policies
themes.blurb: Right-wing and far-right parties across Europe are intensifying their focus on 'national priority' policies, which prioritize citizens over immigrants in access to public services, housing, and employment. This theme is particularly prominent in Spain, Italy, and France, where parties like Vox, Lega, and Rassemblement National are either implementing or advocating for such measures at local and regional levels.

countries.name: 🇪🇸 Vox
countries.note: Vox is actively pushing 'national priority' policies in regional governments, such as Andalusia and Valencia, demanding that Spaniards be prioritized in public services and housing.

countries.name: 🇮🇹 Fratelli d'Italia / Lega
countries.note: Lega has adopted similar rhetoric, particularly in local elections, where it has proposed prioritizing Italians in public services and employment.

countries.name: 🇫🇷 Rassemblement National
countries.note: The party continues to advocate for policies that prioritize French citizens in access to social benefits and public services, aligning with its broader anti-immigration platform.

countries.name: 🇵🇱 Prawo i Sprawiedliwość
countries.note: While not explicitly using the term 'national priority,' PiS has implemented policies that favor Polish citizens in social welfare and housing, reflecting a similar ideological stance.

themes.title: Trump’s policies dominate global right-wing coverage
themes.blurb: Donald Trump's policies and rhetoric continue to shape right-wing discourse globally, with his administration's decisions on immigration, foreign policy, and economic measures being widely covered and emulated by right-wing parties in Europe and beyond. This includes reactions to his stance on Iran, immigration reforms, and domestic policies like healthcare and drug reclassification.

countries.name: 🇺🇸 MAGA / Trump
countries.note: Trump's policies, such as the reclassification of cannabis, immigration restrictions, and military actions against Iran, are central to right-wing discourse in the U.S.

countries.name: 🇬🇧 Reform UK
countries.note: Reform UK frequently references Trump's policies, particularly on immigration and economic nationalism, as a model for its own platform.

countries.name: 🇪🇸 Vox
countries.note: Vox has aligned itself with Trump's anti-immigration stance and has cited his policies as inspiration for its own proposals.

countries.name: 🇮🇹 Fratelli d'Italia / Lega
countries.note: Italian right-wing parties often reference Trump's foreign policy, particularly his stance on Iran and immigration, as a benchmark for their own policies.

countries.name: 🇫🇷 Rassemblement National
countries.note: The party frequently highlights Trump's policies on immigration and national sovereignty as examples of successful right-wing governance.

themes.title: Hungary’s political shift under new leadership
themes.blurb: Hungary's political landscape has undergone a significant transformation following the election of Péter Magyar and the Tisza Party, which ended Viktor Orbán's 16-year rule. This shift is closely watched by right-wing parties in Europe, particularly in Poland and Germany, where there is interest in how Hungary's new government will handle relations with the EU, corruption allegations, and domestic policies.

countries.name: 🇭🇺 Fidesz / Tisza
countries.note: The Tisza Party's victory and its efforts to reform Hungary's political and economic systems are a major focus, with discussions on EU funds, corruption, and relations with Russia and Ukraine.

countries.name: 🇵🇱 Prawo i Sprawiedliwość
countries.note: PiS is closely monitoring Hungary's political shift, particularly how the new government handles corruption allegations and its stance on EU relations.

countries.name: 🇩🇪 Alternative für Deutschland
countries.note: AfD is interested in Hungary's new government as a potential ally in its opposition to EU policies and immigration.

countries.name: 🇺🇸 MAGA / Trump
countries.note: Trump's administration has shown interest in Hungary's shift, particularly in how it might affect U.S.-Hungary relations and broader geopolitical dynamics.

themes.title: Far-right rhetoric fuels political violence
themes.blurb: Far-right rhetoric and policies are increasingly being linked to incidents of political violence across Europe and the U.S. This includes attacks on journalists, protests turning violent, and far-right figures being accused of inciting violence through their statements and actions. The theme is particularly prominent in Italy, the UK, and the U.S., where far-right parties and movements are under scrutiny for their role in escalating tensions.

countries.name: 🇮🇹 Fratelli d'Italia / Lega
countries.note: Lega and Fratelli d'Italia have faced criticism for rhetoric that allegedly incites violence, particularly against immigrants and political opponents.

countries.name: 🇬🇧 Reform UK
countries.note: Reform UK has been linked to incidents of political violence, including attacks on journalists and protests that have turned violent.

countries.name: 🇺🇸 MAGA / Trump
countries.note: Trump's rhetoric has been linked to multiple incidents of political violence, including the recent shooting near the White House Correspondents' Dinner.

countries.name: 🇪🇸 Vox
countries.note: Vox has been accused of inciting violence through its rhetoric, particularly against immigrants and left-wing political opponents.

themes.title: Far-right parties surge in European polls
themes.blurb: Far-right parties across Europe are experiencing a surge in popularity, with polls showing significant gains for parties like Alternative für Deutschland (AfD) in Germany, Rassemblement National in France, and Sverigedemokraterna in Sweden. This trend is being closely watched by right-wing parties in other countries, who see it as a sign of growing public discontent with mainstream politics and immigration policies.

countries.name: 🇩🇪 Alternative für Deutschland
countries.note: AfD is leading in several regional polls and is expected to make significant gains in upcoming elections, particularly in Saxony-Anhalt.

countries.name: 🇫🇷 Rassemblement National
countries.note: The party is polling strongly ahead of the 2027 presidential election, with Marine Le Pen and Jordan Bardella positioning themselves as key figures.

countries.name: 🇸🇪 Sverigedemokraterna
countries.note: Sverigedemokraterna continues to gain support, particularly on issues like immigration and national sovereignty.

countries.name: 🇬🇧 Reform UK
countries.note: Reform UK is making gains in local elections, particularly in areas where immigration and economic dissatisfaction are key issues.

countries.name: 🇳🇴 Fremskrittspartiet
countries.note: The Progress Party is polling strongly in Norway, with Sylvi Listhaug positioning herself as a potential prime ministerial candidate.
